zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane de Tracy於大約1175年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，她的父親William de Tracy43歲，母親Hawise Bourne39歲。她於1194年與Sir Osbert Vampage在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾培斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1195年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾培斯爾享年22歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane de Tracy于大约1175年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾时，她的父亲William de Tracy43岁，母亲Hawise Bourne39岁。她于1194年与Sir Osbert Vampage在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾培斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1195年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾培斯爾享年22岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane de Tracy was born about 1175, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Tracy, was 43 and her mother, Hawise Bourne, was 39. She married Sir Osbert Vampage in 1194, in Pershore, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1195, in Pershore, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane de Tracy est née environ 1175, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Tracy, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Hawise Bourne, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Osbert Vampage en 1194, à Pershore, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1195, à Pershore, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane de Tracy um 1175 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Tracy 43 und ihre Mutter Hawise Bourne 39. Sie hat 1194 in Pershore, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Osbert Vampage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1195 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Pershore, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane de Tracy è nata il circa 1175 nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Tracy, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Hawise Bourne, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Sir Osbert Vampage nel 1194, nel Pershore, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1195, nel Pershore, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 22 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jane de Tracy(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Tracy(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Bourne(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1194년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 퍼쇼어에서 Sir Osbert Vampage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 퍼쇼어에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane de Tracy родилась около 1175 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Tracy было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise Bourne, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Osbert Vampage в 1194 г. в местности пиршаур, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
